description_long: This is a modern, two-story brick house surrounded by a dark wooden fence and mature trees, creating a private and enclosed yard. The exterior walls are primarily red brick, with large rectangular windows distributed asymmetrically on each side. The flat roof design gives the house a contemporary appearance, and the front entryway features a covered porch with a dark awning. The yard includes a paved walkway leading to the main entrance and a small grassy area. The house is set within a fenced lot, providing both security and a sense of seclusion.
description: A modern two-story brick house with a flat roof, large windows, and a fenced yard with mature trees and a paved walkway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a covered porch, paved walkway, and fenced yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tall brick wall, large window, and dense tree coverage along the fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain brick facade with minimal windows and the fenced boundary.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard, additional trees, and the continuation of the fence and walkway.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with a dark awning, single main door, paved walkway, and no visible steps or decorative columns.
